subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God that the divine friends in Boston are in the utmost attraction and enkindlement... Regarding the Convention of the Mashriqu'l-Adhkar in Washington... In those public meetings, universal and not particular principles must be discussed
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
